name: GIST - Gist Intune Script Trigger
description: GIST - Gist Intune Script Trigger is a compact collection of PowerShell scripts for diagnosing and troubleshooting Intune devices. It features a menu-driven interface accessible via a simple one-liner (iwr gist.ittips.ch | iex) and supports direct gist IDs for quick runs. The scripts require no parameters, have no external dependencies, and prioritize safety by not altering system settings.
author: Marius

securityCheck.aiSummary: High-risk remote code execution pattern: the tool fetches and executes code from external URLs at runtime without integrity checks or signing. This creates significant supply-chain and endpoint risk for an Intune script trigger. Mitigations include: remove or replace Invoke-Expression with a safe, signed/script-block execution path, implement strict hash/signature verification or a trusted allowlist, require code signing for remote scripts, reduce non-interactive execution, and add robust logging/telemetry.
